About Me

Registered Pharmacist with a Bachelor of Pharmacy degree and hands-on experience in community pharmacy operations. Skilled in prescription screening, medication dispensing, patient counseling, and inventory management while ensuring compliance with pharmaceutical regulations and patient safety.
